mean_en: the act of making one person formally known to another, in which you tell each the other’s name
sentence: The company believes the introduction of AI technology can improve its business.
sentence_trans: 该公司认为引入人工智能技术可以改善其业务。
word_etyma: intro向内，入内 + duc引导 + tion名词后缀，表状态 → 引进的行为 → introduction介绍；引进
